name: FORUM MARKETS Inc
summary: PART I . Overview Forum Markets, Incorporated( formerly ETHZilla Corporation) (the Company , Forum , we , our or us ) is a financial technology company focused on developing infrastructure that supports the origination, financing, and distribution of RWAs through blockchain-enabled capital markets.
